ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'M' ,RecordType.DeveloperName = 'O' ,RecordType.DeveloperName = 'SH') , Creating__c = false , Refusal__c = false , PriceList__c = false , CASESAFEID(PrimaryCustomer__c) != $Label.ACCOUNT_UNKNOWN , CASESAFEID(PrimaryCustomer__c) != $Label.ACCOUNT_UNDECIDED , ISBLANK( TEXT(ExportManagementProvisionQ3__c)))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: ①一次顧客の顧客調査票(様式K1)の起票要否の選択は必須です。
